Fiercely territorial, the Orzachron utilize their mysterious and destructive weaponry to assault any who draw close.

keys.AllianceHelpKey:
Mighty Alliances form to fight for glory on Erden! 


<color=#00edf6>Joining an Alliance</color> 

You can press the Search or Ranking buttons while you have no alliance to search for an Alliance to join. Alliances may also advertise when they are recruiting in chat. Some alliances may have a minimum Power required to join. You can also view and respond to invitations to join Alliances by pressing the Invites button. 


<color=#00edf6>Creating an Alliance</color>

Create a new Alliance by pressing the "Create" button while you have no Alliance. Creating a new Alliance costs 200 Soul Stones. The Alliance name chosen when creating an Alliance cannot be changed later.


--- Alliance Fame --- 


Fame is a measure of an Alliance's activity that resets to 0 daily at midnight server time. 

Fame is ranked across your server, and the final Fame Ranking before reset determines an Alliance's ability to declare attacks on Castles in Alliance Wars the following day. 


<color=#00edf6>Gaining Fame</color> 

All Alliance members can gain Fame for their Alliance through the following actions: 

- Alliance Check-in (Open the Alliance menu) -
 30 Fame (Once per day) 

-Fast Forward with Soul Stones in the Tower of Trials -
20 Fame 

- Explore in the Tower of Trials -
10 Fame

- Win a Challenge you make in the Arena -
5 Fame

- Complete an Alliance Quest -
1 Fame


--- Alliance Level --- 


Alliance Level is increased once enough Alliance Exp is accumulated by an Alliance's members. 

As an Alliance levels up, it will unlock access to more Alliance Quests, and increase its member limit. 


<color=#00edf6>Gaining Alliance Exp</color> 

All Alliance members can gain Exp for their Alliance through the following actions: 

- Alliance Check-in (Open the Alliance menu) -
100 Alliance Exp (Once per day)

- Complete an Alliance Quest -
Amount varies depending on the quest completed 


--- Alliance Features --- 


<color=#00edf6>Member List</color>

Press the Members button to view current Alliance members and the Chain of Command. Only the Alliance Master may edit the Chain of Command.


<color=#00edf6>Alliance Shop</color> 

Press the Exchange button to view. Alliance Coins earned through Alliance Quests can be exchanged for other items here.


<color=#00edf6>Bulletin Board</color>

Strategists, Generals and Masters can post notices within the Alliance here. 


--- Private Chat Channels --- 


<color=#00edf6>Alliance Chat</color>

A private chat channel for use by all Alliance members.


<color=#00edf6>Alliance Notice</color>

A private chat channel that Strategists, Generals and Masters can use to send important messages. The rest of the Alliance can only read this channel. 


--- Alliance Roles --- 


<color=#00edf6>Master</color>

Master of the Alliance. Only the Master can kick Alliance members and delegate roles in the Chain of Command. 


<color=#00edf6>General</color>

A trusted commander of the Alliance. Combines the permissions of the Strategist and Minister to help lead the Alliance where needed. An Alliance can have up to 2 Generals. 


<color=#00edf6>Strategist</color>

A specialist in Alliance Warfare. The Strategist can post battle plans on the Alliance Bulletin, issue orders during war in Alliance Notice chat, and reorder Platoons in Alliance Wars. An Alliance can only have 1 Strategist.


<color=#00edf6>Minister</color>

A specialist in Alliance administration and special liaison for the Alliance. The Minister can perform various Alliance Management tasks, and other players can contact the Minister directly when viewing an Alliance profile. An Alliance can only have 1 Minister. 


<color=#00edf6>Captain</color>

Alliance members with tactical authority. Captains can reorder Platoons in Alliance Wars. An Alliance can have up to 12 Captains.


<color=#00edf6>Knight</color> 

An honorable member of the Alliance. Has no special permissions, but a healthy Alliance needs many strong Knights to thrive. New members begin as Knights and any number of Alliance members can be Knights. 


--- Managing an Alliance --- 


Ministers, Generals and Masters have use of the Manage button to perform various tasks. 


<color=#00edf6>Invite Players</color>

Displays a list of players that can be invited to the Alliance if desired. The players can be tapped to view their profiles and send an invitation.


<color=#00edf6>Entry Requirements</color>

Allows the minimum Power to join the Alliance to be adjusted. Automated application approval can also be toggled here.


<color=#00edf6>Applicants</color>

View, accept and reject pending applications to the Alliance.


<color=#00edf6>Give Daily Reward</color>

Allows the Daily Alliance Reward to be sent to Alliance chat within set times each day.


<color=#00edf6>Advertisement</color>

Allows a special recruitment message to be sent to World Chat. There is a cool down on how frequently this can be done.


<color=#00edf6>Alliance Introduction</color>

Allows a special introduction message to be set for when non-members view the Alliance profile. 


<color=#00edf6>--- Leaving an Alliance ---</color>


You can leave an Alliance by pressing the Leave button or if you are kicked by the Alliance Master. Please note when leaving an Alliance:

- You will not be able to participate in Alliance War until the next day. 
- You will not be able to participate in any current War of the Realms map on behalf of any Alliance.
- If you have left an Alliance too many times, you will have a 15 hour cool down period before you can join another Alliance. 


<color=#00edf6>--- Master Inactivity ---</color> 


The Master role may be claimed by other Alliance members should the Master not log into the game, as follows: 

- 3+ days inactive: Generals 
 -4+ days inactive: Minister, Strategist 
- 5+ days inactive: Captains 
- 6+ days inactive: Knights
keys.AllianceQuestHelpKey:
Complete Quests to earn Experience for your Alliance, and Alliance Coins which can be exchanged for items in the Alliance Shop. 

Alliance Quests play out automatically using the first 4 Platoons of your Battalion. Each Alliance Quest can only be completed once per day, but can be challenged any number of times. 

As your Alliance's Level increases, more quests will become available here each day. 

Completing at least 1 Alliance Quest will also influence the total of the Soul Stone Gift your Alliance Master can send in your Alliance's Chat that day (if not already sent).

keys.ArenaHelpKey:
Battalions fight it out for Glory in the Arena! Arena rewards include Arena Coins, which can be exchanged for items in the Arena Shop. 


--- Arena Rules ---


- Challenge and defeat other players to exchange places with them in the ranking. 
- The first 4 Platoons of your Battalion are deployed in Arena battles. 
- Challenges are resolved automatically within seconds on the server so can be skipped, but you may watch how the fight plays out, as well as review replays of the latest Challenges against you. 
- You can refresh the players you can Challenge by hitting the refresh button to the right of your current options. 
- You can perform 5 Arena Challenges a day at no cost. More Challenges can be added by consuming Soul Stones. 
- Draws can occur if all units are defeated at the same time, or a battle resolves in a stalemate after too many turns elapse. A draw will always be treated as a victory for the player that was challenged. 
- If your Challenge target's rank is taken before your challenge is resolved, you will exchange your rank with their new lower rank only if it is higher than your current rank. 


--- Rewards --- 


- Rewards are received for each Challenge victory, and Ranking rewards will be handed out each day at 9pm server time. 
- The daily rewards to be received for your currently shown ranking can be seen next to the countdown until reward handout. 


--- Other Notes ---


- Be sure to make use of any Challenges that you add, as Challenges Left will reset to 5 each day at Midnight server time. 
- Your currently displayed ranking does not update automatically, so the Ranking Reward you receive in the daily handout may be lower than last shown if your Rank is overtaken before reward handout time. 
- Replays of your last 5 Arena battles are generally stored for 3 days, but may be cleared whenever battle related data is updated.

keys.BattalionHelpKey:
Build a mighty battalion to increase your total Power, and use it to fight in Warfare modes! 

Your Battalion is comprised of Platoons, which can each hold 5 units. You will begin with just one Platoon, but more will unlock as your Player Rank increases. 

Please note that some Warfare modes specify which Platoons are used, at least 1 Character must be allocated to one of these in order to participate. 

Battalion Mode battles differ to battles using your Story Team as follows:

- Platoons have no Cost limit. 
- Battalion Mode battles are played out automatically. As Commander of your Battalion, you can adjust deployment order and Power Up your units to influence your chance of victory. 
- Leader Skills are not used, no Characters fighting in Battalion Mode are considered leaders. 
- Fellowship bonuses will be active, strengthening all of your units according to the Fellowships you have unlocked. 
- Mercenaries are not used. 
- You cannot use more than one copy of the same Character in your Battalion, even if they would not deploy in battle together. 


--- Battalion Management Tools --- 


<color=#00edf6>Fill All</color> 

Pressing this button will automatically fill any available slots in all of your Platoons with available Characters, Weapons, and Accessories. This will be done in order of Highest to Lowest Power. This will not move units that are already assigned to Platoons. 


<color=#00edf6>Optimize</color> 

The "Fill All" button will change to this if all slots in your Battalion are full. Pressing this will automatically adjust your Platoons to maximize the Power it can currently achieve. Please note that Optimize may move units that are already assigned to Platoons. 


<color=#00edf6>Auto Fill New Units</color> 

When you Summon your first copy of a Character and you have this toggle on, the new Character will automatically be added to a Platoon and equipped with a Weapon and Accessory (if available). 


<color=#00edf6>Clear All</color> 

Pressing this button will allow you to remove all units from your Platoons. 


<color=#00edf6>Edit Mode</color>

In this mode, you can move characters between platoons. Equipped weapons and accessories will move with the character. You can also re-order your platoons by tapping the arrows on the right side of the screen.


<color=#00edf6>Save/Load Battalion</color>

Tap the load button at the top left of the screen to save and load battalion configurations. You can save 10 Battalion formations at one time. You can rename these configurations by tapping on their names in this screen.


--- Platoon Management Tools ---


<color=#00edf6>Edit</color> 

Pressing this next to a Platoon (or on the Platoon itself) will allow you to manually edit the respective Platoon. 


<color=#00edf6>Fill</color> 

Pressing this button next to a Platoon will automatically fill any available slots in that Platoon with available Characters, Weapons and Accessories. This will be done in order of Highest to Lowest Power. This will not move units that are already assigned to Platoons. 


<color=#00edf6>Clear</color> 

Pressing this button next to a Platoon will allow you to remove all units from that Platoon.

It has been lonely, but it is my duty.
I cannot let self-pity get in the way of my research.
keys.CallenDragonTap48Key:
I will never give up, no matter how much despair covers the world.
I will never forget those fools who showed me the uselessness of giving up.
keys.CallenDragonTap49Key:
Everyone rejected my appearance as terrifying.
And naturally so.
But you, though...
Uhuhu, you are an odd one.
keys.CallenRegularGacha45Key:
Hohoho, how fortunate you are,
to have such beautiful genius on your side.
Hunh? Did you just say?"Who's this little girl?"

G-Gaaaah!
I am not a child! You ingrate!
I am the greatest mind of the elves!

I am Callen, genius magical researcher!
You shall remember this for your whole life!
keys.CallenRegularIdle50Key:
Heeey!
Hey!
I am bored! So, so booored!
keys.CallenRegularLogin46Key:
Hohoho!
I have been waiting!
I am ready for anything!
keys.CallenRegularTap47Key:
Hmmm. I am feeling peckish.
Do you have any ice cream?
Any potato chips?
keys.CallenRegularTap48Key:
Zzzz...
Gahah! No, oh no!
I was up all night doing research!
One more experiment...
keys.CallenRegularTap49Key:
I regret it to this day.
My genius ended up harming others.
I will never forget that day, and I will never let it happen again.
keys.CallenSwimsuitGacha45Key:
Hohohoho!
What do you think? Nice body, right?
You can't get enough of it, huh?

A-Adorable!?
You moron!
You mean beautiful! Gorgeous!

Oh, you...
Well, as long as you don't let it happen again.
Come on, it's summer. Let's go have some fun.
keys.CallenSwimsuitIdle50Key:
Hey, you.
You have got quite the nerve, leaving me alone on the beach!
keys.CallenSwimsuitLogin46Key:
Grrr, keeping a beauty like me waiting?
I am going to make you regret that!
keys.CallenSwimsuitTap47Key:
Hohohoho!
Behold! Everyone on the beach is staring at ME!
keys.CallenSwimsuitTap48Key:
Open your ears and you will hear!
All voices give praise to my beauty!\Hohohoho!
keys.CallenSwimsuitTap49Key:
Huh?
"What a cute kid"!?
Why, you!
I am not a child!

I am Shanna, warrior of the sarru.
I look forward to working with you!


Sorry, that's a bit of a lie...
Actually, I'm just a warrior in training...
Eheheh...
keys.CatIdolGirlGacha45Key:
Is this my new stage?
My name's Mirai! I'm a singing, dancing idol!
Would you like to listen to my song?

I'll give it my best, even for an audience of one!
Now, let the concert begin!
keys.CatIdolGirlIdle50Key:
Are you feeling sleepy?
I'd be happy to sing you to sleep!
keys.CatIdolGirlLogin46Key:
Welcome to my concert!
You get to watch from the front row!
keys.CatIdolGirlTap47Key:
Oh, sorry, was I being too loud?
I've got a concert coming up, so I was practicing.
I have to give my audience the ultimate performance!
keys.CatIdolGirlTap48Key:
No matter how cold the night, no matter how hungry I get, music has always held me up.
Music...and my sister.
keys.CatIdolGirlTap49Key:
Phew, it's a bad idea to practice too much.
I think I need a break!
Oh, would you join me?
keys.CatIdolHalloweenGacha45Key:
Trick or treat!
Welcome to my special Halloween concert!
I've got a lot of great songs ready for today!

I'm going to do my best, so listen closely!
Sit back and enjoy the show!
keys.CatIdolHalloweenIdle50Key:
No treats means lots of tricks!
Hey...
Come play with me!
keys.CatIdolHalloweenLogin46Key:
Trick or treat!
Do you want candy?
Or should I sing for you?
keys.CatIdolHalloweenTap47Key:
My costumes for today's concert are a bit more flashy than usual, but that's part of the fun!
This holiday only comes once a year.
keys.CatIdolHalloweenTap48Key:
Oh, you were watching!
I just had to buy all these candies when I saw them at the market!
I couldn't eat things like these when I was a kid, so this feels like a dream...
keys.CatIdolHalloweenTap49Key:
This festival was originally started to welcome the returning spirits of the dead.
I'll sing my very best to help the spirits rest in peace.
keys.CerberusRegularGacha45Key:
Hi, I'm Cerberus!
I'm the gatekeeper of Hell, and one day—no, SOON—I will become its supreme ruler!

Anyway, do you want to hire me?
Huh? You don't need help right now...?
Please! Pretty please! They kicked me out of Hell again, I don't have anywhere to gooo...
keys.CerberusRegularIdle50Key:
Hey. Heeeey.
Where is everyone?
Her Majesty Cerberus needs someone here to worship her right now!
keys.CerberusRegularLogin46Key:
Ugh... Five more minutes...
Duties...? As the Ruler of Hell, I proclaim today to be a holiday... Zzzz...
Eeeeek! Don't open the curtains!!! Nooo, not the sunlight—!
keys.CerberusRegularTap47Key:
The living world isn't that bad, actually! If we could get rid of that pesky sun and those scary things, it'd be almost perfect.
Do I like it more than Hell? Nope. Hell might be dark and gloomy, sure, but it's home.
keys.CerberusRegularTap48Key:
My ears? I started wearing them to look like those scary things! I figured, if even I am scared of them, then everyone else must be totally terrified, right?
I mean, I USED to be scared, but I'm not anymore, so—
Aaah! A dog!!!
keys.CerberusRegularTap49Key:
Ludmillaaa∼
Wait, do I still have to call you "Marshal"?
What, you came to apologize for that whole "erasing Hell" mess again? It's fine, everybody makes mistakes, you know!
Aside from me, of course!

keys.CharacterStatsTextKey:
HP is the amount of health the character has.

Attack is the basis for determining how much damage abilities deal.

Speed determines how much TU the character has when entering battle, which will affect how soon they get their first turn. Higher speed means lower initial TU, which allows the character to get their first turn sooner. 

When a character equips their preferred weapon type, the weapon's skill will be activated.

Awakening increases a character's HP and Attack, and unlocks new passive skills.

Boosts give stat bonuses and can be gained from Powering Up with Boost Gems.

Potential increases HP and Attack by a percentage, and can be increased by Powering Up with Fruit of Potential.

keys.CherryBlossomGacha45Key:
I am Oumei, spirit of the sakura.
I only blossom once every 20 years,
and when I do I can grant someone's wish.
*Yawn* Oh, I-I beg your pardon!
I mean, I did just wake up from a 20 year nap,
I'm still just a little groggy, heehee.
keys.CherryBlossomIdle50Key:
Oh, are you sleeping?
Heeheehee, then I think I'll just get a nap in, too!
keys.CherryBlossomLogin46Key:
Good morning!
Your sakura blossom has been waiting for you to come home!
keys.CherryBlossomTap47Key:
I love the warmth of the sun.
And I love the smell of plants and the earth.
They all make me feel nice...
And sleepy... *Yawn.*
keys.CherryBlossomTap48Key:
Flower petals fall, but the energy of life goes round.
It sleeps in the earth and returns when flowers bloom again.
keys.CherryBlossomTap49Key:
I'm feeling a little sleepy...
Could I borrow your lap?
I get the feeling it will make a wonderful pillow... *Yawn*
keys.ChineseRizetteGacha45Key:
Sorry to keep you waiting!
You weren't waiting?
Oh, well, that's good, I guess.

I've never celebrated the New Year
like this before. And I've never dressed
like this before, either...

You'd tell me if it looked funny, right?
I-It looks really good on me?
Oh... Thanks.
keys.ChineseRizetteIdle50Key:
Today was a really big day, thanks for all your hard work.
The festival was so much fun, but now it's over... Oh, fireworks!
keys.ChineseRizetteLogin46Key:
I have the feeling something's about to begin.
I hope my wish for everyone's happiness really does come true.
keys.ChineseRizetteTap47Key:
Oh wow!
Festivals in the capital really are amazing.
There are so many people, and there's so much going on! It makes me dizzy!
keys.ChineseRizetteTap48Key:
Rolotia, where are you going?
I should handle the rest?
But everything's ready for the festival— And there she goes. So, I guess it's just the two of us, now...
keys.ChineseRizetteTap49Key:
My hometown of Westcarte was a small village...
We had festivals, but nothing this big.
S-So, if it's alright, I'd appreciate it if you showed me around.
keys.ChopinRegularGacha45Key:
I'm Chopin... in case that wasn't obvious.
Oh? You need a favor from me?
How delightfully unusual.

Very well. I could use a little diversion.
Perhaps you can keep me entertained until the day I die! ♪
keys.ChopinRegularIdle50Key:
Hmm-hmm, hmm-hmm-hmm～♪
A delightful little melody... and an equally delightful idea for a prank just came to me...
Now then... which one should I start with first...? Hehe...
keys.ChopinRegularLogin46Key:
Well, you've kept me waiting long enough! Shall we start our search then?
You're going to help me find someone in such terrible, dreadful trouble they don't know what to do with themselves!
keys.ChopinRegularTap47Key:
Don't you know? I'm not able to eat food.
So you'd better eat these vegetables for me! Oh, you wouldn't let these poor veggies go to waste, would you?
...Wait, you like vegetables? What's wrong with you?
keys.ChopinRegularTap48Key:
Washington's a good, honest sort. I think you'll like her.
...Just don't tell her I said that, all right?
keys.ChopinRegularTap49Key:
If I had to choose between making music and making machinery... hmm... I suppose I couldn't give up either one.
They're both part of what makes me who I am. I couldn't abandon either of them.
keys.ChristmasCatEarGacha45Key:
Shanna, Santa in training!
Anyone need presents?


H-huh?
Oh no, I left my sack somewhere!


Uuh...
Hold on, I'll get a bunch of cakes and
presents ready for the next time!
keys.ChristmasElminaGacha45Key:
Merry Christmas!
Elmina Claus has brought presents
for all the good boys and girls!

And for you... You'll have to wait
until after the children get theirs.
Come on, give me a hand!

Don't worry, now,
I have something for you too.

O-Oh, no, never mind...
Come on, hurry up!
keys.ChristmasElminaIdle50Key:
Heey!
Now it's not Elmina Claus, but the Real Santa's turn to fill the sleeping childrens' stockings with presents.
keys.ChristmasElminaLogin46Key:
Guess who?
Elmina? Nope!
Today, I'm not sweet and friendly Elmina, I'm sweet and friendly Elmina Claus!
keys.ChristmasElminaTap47Key:
I turned into Santa so I could make all the children happy! Even if they have to wake up from the dream one day.
Maybe I also wanted to believe...
Santa is real.
keys.ChristmasElminaTap48Key:
Okay, kids!
That's all the presents from Elmina Claus this year!
Make sure you're good boys and girls for next year!
keys.ChristmasElminaTap49Key:
Oh, were you waiting for a present, too?
Sorry, all my deliveries are done!
Kidding, kidding!
I kept one back... Something special!
keys.ChronosRegularGacha45Key:
I am Chronos, the Primordial,
the one who governs the flow of time.

Oh dear, did I make you nervous?
There is no need, I don't get angry.
As long as time flows properly, that is.
keys.ChronosRegularIdle50Key:
Nobody's around... Now's my chance.
Ahh...yes, ruthless intellectual and superior officer pairing is truly supreme...
I think I'm gonna die from the feels...!
keys.ChronosRegularLogin46Key:
Oh my, you're late!
Time is precious—treat it with care.
keys.ChronosRegularTap47Key:
Usually, I reside in the Temple of Time, a dimension separate from this one. There, I watch over the world, ensuring there are no defects in the flow of time.
After all, we are beings beyond the bounds of humans.
keys.ChronosRegularTap48Key:
Really? You are calling me beautiful...?
You're quite charming yourself. Lets my imagination to run wild.
For example...hehe...hehehehehe... Oops..
keys.ChronosRegularTap49Key:
The book lying over there...?
...No no no! Hey! Give that back!
Huff, huff...That was close. I will get angry if you do that again!
keys.CinderellaDarkGacha45Key:
There once was a princess who wanted to get stronger...and so, she obtained the power of darkness.
All to save one person...

Come with me, if you dare! Down the thorny path we go...
keys.CinderellaDarkIdle50Key:
Where is everyone?
How dare they leave me all alone, honestly... Hehe, I think I'll give them a taste of my power once they're back!
keys.CinderellaDarkLogin46Key:
You're here... Are you ready?
If you are, you can come along. I don't mind having someone to travel with.
keys.CinderellaDarkTap47Key:
Talia was gifted with Reverie Power... If it were me, I'd rather get the power to control people.
But for now, I think I'll just command you. You'd better appreciate the honor!
keys.CinderellaDarkTap48Key:
Black diamond, onyx, serendibite, obsidian—
there's something so enchanting about black gemstones! Don't you think?
keys.CinderellaDarkTap49Key: I like this dark version of myself quite a lot! Jet black really makes other colors pop. Maybe I should make a similar outfit for her...
keys.CinderellaRegularGacha45Key:
I'm Cinderella.

If you called me here to do something boring,
I'll give you a taste of my rapier,
so choose your next words wisely!
keys.CinderellaRegularIdle50Key:
Where'd you go...?
I take it that you went out to have a snack or something. You'd better bring some for me too, or else!
keys.CinderellaRegularLogin46Key:
You dare make a princess wait? The nerve...
Come on, get ready and let's go!
keys.CinderellaRegularTap47Key: Now, where did she disappear to this time? She can be such a handful, I swear...
keys.CinderellaRegularTap48Key: Boredom is a fate worse than death. I expect you to do something about it, don't let me down!
keys.CinderellaRegularTap49Key: I like gemstones and pretty dresses. Nothing better than dressing all fancy and dancing the night away at a ball!
keys.CinderellaSwimsuitGacha45Key:
Excellent timing. You're the first person I wanted to show my new swimsuit to.
Well? Are you going to stand there and gape all day?
You've been blessed with the view of me, set off by the clear blue sea. Don't you have anything to say?
keys.CinderellaSwimsuitIdle50Key:
I should be going back. Talia's going to be upset.
"Curfew" is such a lamentable concept... Well, nothing lasts forever, I guess.
keys.CinderellaSwimsuitLogin46Key:
Don't you know it's incredibly rude to make a lady wait for so long in this heat? Honestly...
Hm? What's that? A Caramel Almond Choco-Vanilla Frappuccino... For me?
Very well. You have earned my forgiveness.
keys.CinderellaSwimsuitTap47Key:
You're staring again.
Well, I suppose it can't be helped. I look flawless, after all.
keys.CinderellaSwimsuitTap48Key:
I love pretty things. Not only gems, but anything shiny and transparent. Like pure glass, or the sea when it glitters in the sun.
How about you, hm? Is your heart pure?
keys.CinderellaSwimsuitTap49Key:
Ah, the sea breeze made me all sticky. I'm going to take a bath.
You'd better take one too, if you want to spend time with me later.
keys.CleopatraDarkGacha45Key:
Shush now... Honestly, to think I'd run into you on a job...
What job? Isn't it obvious? Espionage.
Naturally, I'd rather you didn't tell anyone. We're accomplices now, aren't we?
keys.CleopatraDarkIdle50Key:
I was weak... And that's why I lost everything.
I wonder what my life would've been like if I had met you before I sold my soul to the devil...
keys.CleopatraDarkLogin46Key:
Well then, let's get to work.
Hm? Am I here because I lost my kingdom? Hehe, that's not possible. A woman has many faces, that is all.
keys.CleopatraDarkTap47Key: My mission to infiltrate other nations? It was part of my agreement with my late master, but above all, I do it for the sake of my beloved country. You see, the fight begins long before the war is declared.
keys.CleopatraDarkTap48Key:
Cthulhu... A trace of that malevolent god's presence remains within me. I wish it didn't...
First my former master, then this thing... It seems the divine just cannot get enough of me.
keys.CleopatraDarkTap49Key:
I forced you to be my accomplice, and you won't even try to run away or double-cross me?
If only I'd had a subject like you back then... Ah, never mind.
keys.CleopatraRegularGacha45Key:
Oh my, so you're a hero too?
I seem to be drawn to a certain type, aren't I.

My name is Cleopatra. I come from the Kingdom of Kemet.
Let's leave it at that for now, shall we?
keys.CleopatraRegularIdle50Key:
My darling white lily...
Someone as steeped in deceit and blood as I am shouldn't even think of touching one as pure as you. I'll be glad just to be allowed to stay by your side.
keys.CleopatraRegularLogin46Key:
I've been waiting for you to arrive.
I have the honor of being your servant, at least for now. Command me as you please.
keys.CleopatraRegularTap47Key:
You'd like to know what I like? Definitely hot baths. The way they warm me up and release all the tension... A most delightful pastime.
What else... Hm? Flowers? Yes, I wish I could say the same...
keys.CleopatraRegularTap48Key: What I dislike? I believe I have made that clear. Traitors who dare harm my beloved. I'll use any means necessary to make them pay.
keys.CleopatraRegularTap49Key:
That queen of Orugeia...
If only we could build a kingdom together...
No, once a country has two rulers, it's already all over, isn't it.

keys.ColiseumEventHelpKey:
Welcome to the Colosseum! Bring your best teams to fight against Commanders from around the world to gain Points and prizes. A strong team will earn you more Points, but beware — the crowd gets bored of repetition. You will have to assemble a variety of teams in order to earn the most Points!

You earn Points based on your enemy's strength. The more powerful your team is the more powerful the enemy will be.

As you win more battles your Point Multiplier will increase. The higher your Multiplier, the more Points you gain from every battle, but be careful, as the Multiplier increases so will the enemy strength.

If you lose too many fights in a row, your Multiplier may drop.

Using characters requires Command Points. The more times the same element is used, the more Command it will cost to use. Switch up your team in order to gain the most Points.

Command Required is reset and Command refreshes every 24 hours.

You will earn rewards for hitting certain Point Milestones.

At the end of the event rewards will also be handed out based on your final ranking.

Event Notes:

1: Command is spent even if you lose a match

2:If you lose a battle with more than one win in the Level, you will be put to one win in the current level. If you lose a battle with one win in the current level, you will be put to one win in the previous level.

keys.ConquestHelpKey:
Challenge powerful bosses, collect Loot gathered by your Battalion over time, and Explore for even more treasure! 

Press the "Challenge Boss" button to immediately send the first 4 Platoons of your Battalion to battle the next floor boss. Tower of Trials battles play out automatically within seconds, and may be viewed or skipped as you wish.

Claiming victory over a boss grants immediate rewards and advances your Battalion to the next floor of the tower. The bosses will do their best to stop you, but there is no limit to the number of times you can challenge the next floor! 


--- Tower of Trials Loot Chest ---


Tap the loot chest to collect the loot gathered over time from the tower by your Battalion! You can increase the amount of loot collected over time by climbing to higher floors in the tower and by reaching certain VIP levels. 


<color=#00edf6>Tower Chest Loot Capacity</color>

The Tower of Trials Loot Chest can hold up to 10 hours worth of loot by default. When this capacity is reached, your Battalion will wait for you to collect the loot before they can begin filling the chest again. This capacity can be increased by reaching certain VIP levels. 


<color=#00edf6>Fast Forward</color> 

Soul Stones and Time Gems can be consumed to speed up time in the tower a limited number of times each day, allowing you to collect even more loot! Press the Fast Forward button to view the options available. Your daily Fast Forward with Soul Stones limit can be increased by reaching certain VIP levels. 


--- Exploration ---


Exploration commands a hunt for rare items in the tower. Once unlocked, you can perform up to 3 Explorations a day at no cost. 


<color=#00edf6>Add Explorations</color> 

You can add more Explorations by consuming Exploration Decrees (unlimited) or Soul Stones (limited times per day - limit can be increased by reaching certain VIP levels).

Be sure to complete any Explorations you add, as Explorations Left will reset to 3 each day at Midnight server time.

Hello, my name's Momoka Kamiya.
My special skills are kagura dance and naps,
and I can do some magic too, just a little.
Glad to meet you!

keys.CowGirlTap47Key:

keys.CowGirlTap49Key:

Heehee, silly boy. I'm just kidding.
keys.CrescentIdle29Key:
Zzzz... Hm? Oh snap!.
I actually fell asleep.
keys.CrescentLogin25Key:
Hm... It seems my time is here.
Whatever enemy comes, I will drown them in darkness, if that is your wish.
keys.CrescentTap26Key:
This body holds a legendary dark power...
A frightful blackness that will engulf all in its path.
keys.CrescentTap27Key:
Darkness is the ultimate harmony.
If you offer any resistance, you should be prepared for a suitable sacrifice.
keys.CrescentTap28Key:
Names define the person.
In the past, I was called by the name of the moon...
I suppose I was happy enough back then.
keys.CrossSwordKnightDarkGacha45Key:
I have given my life and my fate up to darkness for our king.
I don't need a name. I live to execute her orders, nothing more.
keys.CrossSwordKnightDarkIdle50Key: I will stand by until the king is back. That too is one of my duties.
keys.CrossSwordKnightDarkLogin46Key: You're on time. Our king is waiting. If you are ready to leave behind everything but loyalty, follow me.
keys.CrossSwordKnightDarkTap47Key: I'm watching the lightless moon. It reflects ambition and delusion, alluring like our king's unfulfilled wish...
keys.CrossSwordKnightDarkTap48Key: I will slay anyone who stands in the way of our king's reign. Even my fellow knights.
keys.CrossSwordKnightDarkTap49Key: Lancelot is very reliable…but I worry she might take things too far one day.
keys.CrossSwordKnightGacha45Key:
Gawain.
I need no further introduction.
If you need my help, I'll lend a hand.
If not, let me be.
I only want to bring about justice...
and break this curse.
keys.CrossSwordKnightIdle50Key:
I'm standing by.
Let me know if something comes up.
keys.CrossSwordKnightLogin46Key:
What should I do?
A concise answer, please.
keys.CrossSwordKnightTap47Key:
The king's word is absolute.
And necessary to break this curse...
keys.CrossSwordKnightTap48Key:
In a perfect world, we would be able to save everyone.
But this world is not perfect.
Here, one must choose.
keys.CrossSwordKnightTap49Key:
I like cats.
Their fluffiness drives all thoughts from my head.
keys.CthulhuGirlRegularGacha44Key:
My name is R'lyeh. Starting today, I will be your personal attendant.
I'll do my best to make your everyday life easier.

As for fighting, I can only use a little magic...
But if it comes to the worst, I can ask Mr. Monster for help.
keys.CthulhuGirlRegularIdle49Key: I can hear Mr. Monster's voice... I may have to leave your side for a while... But even Mr. Monster can't stop me from protecting you.
keys.CthulhuGirlRegularLogin45Key:
Hello. I've been waiting for you.
I've prepared some food. Are you hungry?
Oh, you are? Yay! I'm so glad I could be of help...
keys.CthulhuGirlRegularTap46Key: Please, don't push yourself too hard. If you're tired, just say a word, and I'll give you a back rub. I'll be happy to pat your head too, if you'd like.
keys.CthulhuGirlRegularTap47Key:
You're injured!
"It's just a scratch"? I don't think so. It must be disinfected immediately.
Oh, I shouldn't have left your side...
keys.CthulhuGirlRegularTap48Key: Ms. Napoleon said she'd be fine on her own, but I wonder if she's taking care of herself properly... I should check in on her soon.
keys.CyrusGacha45Key:
Oh, looks like I'm up?
Now, this is a surprise!

I never dreamed the door connecting fates
would bring us together.
This is a future the tarot never revealed.

Well, I'll try not to make it a bad one.
Good to work with you!
keys.CyrusIdle50Key:
All tired out?
Go ahead and get some rest.
You can give us some orders when you get back.
keys.CyrusLogin46Key:
Nice work out there today.
It's hard to get anything started without you around, you know.
keys.CyrusTap47Key:
What am I up to?
Oh, nothing much.
I'm not really one for big ambitions or grandiose ideals.
keys.CyrusTap48Key: Ohhoo, the cards have something big in store for you today!
keys.CyrusTap49Key:
Seems when people get old, the good old days start to look better and better.
I hate the thought of it, myself!
keys.DailyEventWinTextKey: Win one daily power up mission
keys.DamageReducNoReinforcementsAffectedKey: 15% damage reduction from attacks if there are no allied reinforcements.
keys.DancingAssassinGacha45Key:
I'm Alira.
I'm a simple traveling dancer,
but I suppose I can fight a little.

Uh, you want to see me dance?
I suppose you could, but it's not cheap.
It's worth more than your life.

Ha, just kidding!
Heehee, don't be so skittish!
keys.DancingAssassinIdle50Key:
Hey, what's the idea?
Why are you looking around with a cutie like me right here?
keys.DancingAssassinLogin46Key:
Welcome, welcome!
It's time for the dance to begin!
keys.DancingAssassinSwimsuitGacha45Key:
Tadaaa! Dancing Alira, now in a swimsuit!
What? What do you mean,
it's no different from my regular clothes?
It's totally different, look at this fabric!


Would you like to touch and see?


Heeheehee, just kidding.
You're so cute when you blush!
keys.DancingAssassinSwimsuitIdle50Key:
What's wrong?
Are you mesmerized by my swimsuit?
keys.DancingAssassinSwimsuitLogin46Key: Oh, there you are again, darling!♪ Come have fun with me!♪ Heehee!
keys.DancingAssassinSwimsuitTap48Key:
Would you oil me up?
Thank you!
Oh, but watch where you touch, okay～
If you touch the wrong place, I might have to kill you♪
keys.DancingAssassinSwimsuitTap49Key:
Oh, where have I been?
People kept trying to pick me up!
I was desperate to get away, honest!
Heehee...
keys.DancingAssassinTap47Key:
Heehee, you want to dance with me?
Of course! But take the lead, please♪
keys.DancingAssassinTap48Key:
Hey, hands off the merchandise!
I'm not one to just give stuff away, you know♪
keys.DancingAssassinTap49Key:
Ahahah, I guess my dance lured you in!
Just be careful, even the most beautiful rose has thorns.
keys.DarkAstridGacha45Key:
My name is Astrid.
Just Astrid.
I have cast off my past self.

Will you be able to control my dark
and twisted power, I wonder...?


If you say so, I will give all to you.
keys.DarkAstridIdle50Key:
When conflict arises, there is no right side.
The error is allowing conflict to arise in the first place.
I suppose that is just more monstrous nonsense.
keys.DarkAstridLogin46Key:
I am well, thank you.
It is a good day to wreak my vengeance.
Heheh, hahahahaha!
keys.DarkAstridNewYearGacha45Key:
If souls cycle eternally, if they have no end, this hatred will never fade.
That is what I believe.
I never dreamed this day would come.
All of this is thanks to you.

Forget about the unbreakable chains of the past.
Today, let us celebrate.
Along with the wandering souls.
keys.DarkAstridNewYearIdle50Key:
Oh, were you sleeping?
You know, I have not slept since I came into this body.
I hope you have pleasant dreams.
keys.DarkAstridNewYearLogin46Key:
So, shall we begin?
Do as you wish.
Whatever you wish.
keys.DarkAstridNewYearTap47Key:
A wish?
You can wish for anything you want, any time you want.
But there is no wish more foolish than to be able to change the past.
keys.DarkAstridNewYearTap48Key:
What does it mean to change as you grow older?
I am eternally unchanging, so could you tell me...?
No, nothing is truly unchanging.
keys.DarkAstridNewYearTap49Key:
The things we believe never change, always do.
Some embrace the change.
Others try to resist when they feel it coming.
And there are fools who do neither.
Which path do you choose?
keys.DarkAstridTap47Key:
Take, be taken, and take again. Be killed, kill, then be killed again.
It is endless, this eternal, foolish cycle.
How delightful!
How truly delightful!
keys.DarkAstridTap48Key:
It seems you are under attack.
Hurry off to protect your allie— Me? Protect what?
I don't have anything to protect.
If I had, I would just destroy and destroy and destroy it all!
keys.DarkAstridTap49Key:
Justice? I suppose there may be such a thing.
Perhaps.
Feel free to try finding it, if you want.
But if you follow that path until its end, I wonder which one of us will end up being the true monster?
keys.DarkCatFighterGacha41Key:
I will take any job, no matter how dirty,
no matter how difficult.
If it will keep Mirai safe.
I will fight anyone who harms her,
even you.
keys.DarkLudmillaGacha45Key:
I am Ludmilla Aldyne.
I am in charge of the Vanguard,
the squad protecting people from the undead.

Don't underestimate me.
I am a military commander,
but I'm also strong on my own.

All to protect others.
That's how you should use your wits, too.
I'm counting on you.
keys.DarkLudmillaIdle50Key:
Did you wear yourself out training day and night?
Practicing on your own is fine, in general.
However... find a rival.
That will help you improve for sure.
keys.DarkLudmillaLogin46Key:
You're right on time.
I value discipline, as should you.
Discipline brings order.
keys.DarkLudmillaTap47Key:
We've confirmed an enemy incursion.
We must completely annihilate them.
I'll lead our forces, come along with me.
keys.DarkLudmillaTap48Key:
Solo training?
Go on, pay no mind to me.
Hmph. You remind me of the old days.
Keep it up.
keys.DarkLudmillaTap49Key:
Comrades?
I have no comrades.
Everyone under my command is an obedient pawn.
I do not tolerate failure, not even in death.
keys.DarkRizetteChristmasGacha45Key:
If only the gently falling snow of midwinter
would melt and wash away my sins...
Never mind, I was just enjoying old dreams.

You will come to hate me, too.
But I will stay with you
until that happens.
keys.DarkRizetteChristmasIdle50Key:
You get lost in thought sometimes.
That's fine. You can take your time.
keys.DarkRizetteChristmasLogin46Key:
I see you're here, too.
It looks like the preparations are done.
Now, we can get the holiday celebration started.
keys.DarkRizetteChristmasTap47Key:
I don't look like I'm having fun?
No, you're wrong.
But I have no right to smile.
Pay no mind to me.
keys.DarkRizetteChristmasTap48Key:
Sin is as cold and heavy as snow, but unlike snow it doesn't simply melt away.
And so, my penance goes on.
keys.DarkRizetteChristmasTap49Key:
The past will not disappear.
But the kindness you offer refuses to fade as well.
Thank you.
Let me simply say that.
keys.DarkRizetteGacha45Key:
What's all this?
What am I doing here?

I don't understand it...
If we are bound together,
it must be fate.

I beg your pardon, I forgot to introduce myself.
I'm Rizette. Rizette of the dark flame,
twisted by the wheel of fate.
keys.DarkRizetteIdle50Key:
Alone...
Cold... So cold...
Do I... Seek warmth?
Though my very blood runs cold?
keys.DarkRizetteLogin46Key:
There you are.
I wouldn't say I was waiting, really, but...
Anyway, what are we doing today?
keys.DarkRizetteSwimsuitGacha45Key:
I'm Riz—
No. I'm the one who gets back up no matter
how many times she's knocked down.
You can call me "Endless Rizette."

Hm? This outfit? It seemed practical.
For what purpose? Combat, of course.
keys.DarkRizetteSwimsuitIdle50Key:
You must've been really tired to fall asleep like this.
...You remind me of someone very special to me. He had the same kind nature...and that's what made him vulnerable.
I'm not going to let the same thing happen to you.
keys.DarkRizetteSwimsuitLogin46Key:
You're here. I had a feeling you were going to arrive soon. I've been waiting.
How long? Doesn't matter. We can make up for that if we ride fast enough.
keys.DarkRizetteSwimsuitTap47Key:
To be honest, I don't know if keeping my undead powers after becoming an Avatar is a good thing or a bad thing.
You shouldn't try to poke at me like that, though, that's for sure.
keys.DarkRizetteSwimsuitTap48Key:
...I told you not to poke at me, didn't I?
I... It's true that I'm not undead anymore, but...
That also means that I can feel warmth again...
keys.DarkRizetteSwimsuitTap49Key:
Ah, yes. Hibiki the Vessel.
I shouldn't use the"Vessel" part in front of everyone?
I see... It's a shame, though. "Vessel" sounds cool.
keys.DarkRizetteTap47Key:
I am burdened with sin.
One such as you has no business with the likes of me.
keys.DarkRizetteTap48Key:
D-Don't touch me!
Simply touching me could transform you into an undead monster!
And if that happens, I...
keys.DarkRizetteTap49Key:
When I build a wall, you simply jump over it.
Your kindness...
Troubles me.

I am Leonardo da Vinci.
I'm so excited to be here!

I heard that I'll be able to explore unknown worlds
if I join you! Let's start our journey
as soon as possible!
keys.DaVinciRegularIdle50Key: Oh, you get absorbed in the inventing process sometimes too? I knew we were two peas in a pod!
keys.DaVinciRegularLogin46Key: Hello again! Off we go, into the unknown!
keys.DaVinciRegularTap47Key:
Hmmm, too little mana in the condenser, maybe?
Ah! Sorry! I got completely absorbed in my tinkering...
keys.DaVinciRegularTap48Key:
I often get told that I act like a child... It's not true, right?

keys.DaVinciRegularTap49Key: The secret of my inventions? Hmm, let me think... There is no big secret, inspiration is all around us!
keys.Day2IssuesLongKey:
Thank you for playing Evertale.

The game has launched to an overwhelming reception, and we are very grateful for everyone eagerly picking it up from day one.
However, the sheer volume of users have put a lot of pressure on our servers, which has caused some unanticipated problems.
As a result, we had to put the game in maintenance mode for several hours to fix these issues, and we are very sorry for the inconvenience. These issues are now fixed. As compensation, we are handing out 500 Soul Stones to everyone.

As mentioned above, most of these problems should be fixed now. If you are still seeing any of the symptoms listed below, please contact our customer support at evertalesupport@zigzagame.com, and we will troubleshoot your issues directly.
Symptoms include:
A. Certain characters and weapons obtained through game play disappear from your Team Management
B. Your player rank gets reduced
C. Soul Stones you claimed from progressing the game get lost

You may have noticed that weapon shops became unavailable during maintenance mode. This is a bug, and we will be fixing this in the next update.

Also, we would like to bring to your attention that currently, your account info gets fully synced with our servers only when you go to the home menu while online. This means any progress you make before you return to the home menu is at risk for being lost from your backup save file on our servers. This will also be fixed in the next update, but until then we do not recommend using the save file restore function unless absolutely necessary.

Please rest assured that there will be an update soon to fix these issues and more.
Thank you for your understanding and support!
keys.Day2IssuesShortKey: Due to the overwhelming reception, there have been some performance issues with our servers, which led to an extended maintenance period. This problem is now fixed.
keys.DaylightSavingsNewsLongKey: Server times have been adjusted due to Daylight Savings ending.
keys.DeadlyNurseGacha45Key:
My name is Reina Fujiwara.
I graduated from Shinano Academy and am a doctor.
My skills will likely be of use.

I know how to heal people.
I might also know how to destroy them...
Heehee, I'm joking. Don't look at me like that.
keys.DeadlyNurseIdle50Key:
You seem to be resting easy.
But I think you're okay to work a little.
keys.DeadlyNurseLogin46Key:
Ah, I see you've arrived.
What kind of treatment do you need today?
Heehee...
keys.DeadlyNurseTap47Key:
Aren't you overdoing it recently?
Prevention is better than cure... You'd better listen to doctor's orders.
keys.DeadlyNurseTap48Key:
To prove that I can cure any illness or curse.
That used to be my dream.
But the world was simply too harsh to allow me to keep dreaming.
keys.DeadlyNurseTap49Key:
One thing...
Don't even try to lay a finger on my secrets.
You wouldn't want me to treat you.
Heehee...
keys.DeadlyVampireGacha45Key:
I'm Reina.
I'm tickled you summoned me!

What an adorable face you have!
I could just eat you up...
Heehee, just kidding.
keys.DeadlyVampireIdle50Key:
The cuckoo is calling...
Would you come play with me?
keys.DeadlyVampireLogin46Key:
Oh, come over here, sweetie.
Let's go, you and me♪
keys.DeadlyVampireTap47Key:
You want to know my secret?
Teehee, well, now!
You come right over here, and I'll tell you all about it...
keys.DeadlyVampireTap48Key:
Now, now, what are you scared of?
Blood?
Oh, no, this isn't blood!
It's just tomato juice...
keys.DeadlyVampireTap49Key:
You're a stubborn one, aren't you.
If you become my disciple, we'll have lots of fun.
Heehee, but I might like that stubborn streak of yours...
keys.DeathKnightGacha45Key:
Merdain, knight of Hymelia.
Destiny has brought me here.
keys.DeathKnightIdle50Key:
Are you done dawdling already?
What kind of attitude is that for someone in charge of an army?
keys.DeathKnightLogin46Key:
Here you are...
I knew you wouldn't be able to resist showing up now.
Right, then, let's go!
keys.DeathKnightTap47Key:
Watch your hands.
Next time you touch me without permission, you're dead.
keys.DeathKnightTap48Key:
You want to polish my armor?
I don't see why not.
But do it right, and don't peel the paint.
keys.DeathKnightTap49Key:
Do you...have friends?
Can you picture a future with them?
Never mind. Forget I asked.
keys.DeerGirlGacha45Key:
Thank you for summoning me.
I am Haku Urushido.

Onmyo is my way to be myself, my only oracle.

If my pursuit of it may be of help to you, then, I would be happy to join you.
keys.DeerGirlIdle50Key:
You seem tired.
Would you join me for tea?
keys.DeerGirlLogin46Key:
You are here.
I am ready.
keys.DeerGirlTap47Key: For me, onmyo is neither witchcraft nor divination, it is a form of prayer.
keys.DeerGirlTap48Key:
Sage Rei, Mizuchi...
I have such great role models.
I am so grateful to be fortunate enough to be alive at the same time as they are.
keys.DeerGirlTap49Key:
Huh? There's a rice cracker crumb on my lip...?
Oh, oh no...
This is so embarrassing...
You found out that I've been snacking.
Um...
Please, keep this a secret?
keys.DefeatGuideStoryKey: You can rearrange your story team!
keys.DemonElfBoyGacha43Key:
Hey, hey, lookie at this maul!
It's all full of amazing power
that's only for me!

Oh, sorry about that.
My name's Vonn, and I know how I look,
but I'm nobility.

I want to get stronger so I can keep
my father and our lands safe.
Hey, why don't you help, too!
keys.DemonElfBoyIdle48Key:
I feel like I'm becoming less and less myself.
I'm scared... Someone... Help me.
keys.DemonElfBoyLogin44Key:
Oh, you're back!
Hey, what kind of enemy do you want me to kill next?
keys.DemonElfBoyTap45Key:
Leave it all to me!
I'm pretty good at making corpses.
keys.DemonElfBoyTap46Key:
Don't doubt me!
I mean. I can k-k-kill...
Enemies...
keys.DemonElfBoyTap47Key:
Battle! Hurry up and lead me to battle...
I'll... destroy... all.
keys.DevilLadyGacha41Key:
Heeheehee... My, you're something.
Would you show me the lovely color
of your blood?
keys.DisclaimerTextKey:
New characters and weapons introduced in the Soul Summon will be added to Premium Soul Summon at the end of each month, unless they are Limited Time Characters or Weapons.
Due to rounding, the percentages on this page may not add up to 100%.
This summon will summon both Characters and Weapons.
Duplicate characters and weapons may be summoned.
Legal information regarding this feature can be found in the Legal Information section.This section can be accessed by tapping on the options button in the top left drop down menu.
Summon X10 Guaranteed Minimum 1 SSR or SR will be either a weapon or a character. The Summon X10 Guaranteed Minimum 1 character may be of any rarity.
You are guaranteed to receive at least one featured SSR character within 500 items received from this Soul Summon. This count resets on this Soul Summon upon receiving a featured SSR character from this Soul Summon. This count will not carry over to another Soul Summon, even if the featured SSR character is the same. For summons where all SSR characters have equal chance to appear, all SSR characters are considered to be featured SSR characters. Otherwise, the SSR character(s) with the highest summon rate is considered to be the featured SSR character.
keys.DonQuixoteRegularGacha45Key:
Um, I'm Don Quixote, an orderly of the Knights
of the Round Table! I am second to none when it
comes to drive, spirit, and admiration!

I'll burst through any wall...!
Let's charge ahead together!
keys.DonQuixoteRegularIdle50Key: Huh? Where did everyone from the Round Table go...? Sir Gawain? Sir Lancelot? Hello...? Nobody's here...
keys.DonQuixoteRegularLogin46Key: Here I am at full speed! Um... let's do our best together! So, uh, where are we headed?
keys.DonQuixoteRegularTap47Key:
I love the stories of the Knights of the Round Table!
When I first heard them, I didn't think they were real people... silly of me, right?
keys.DonQuixoteRegularTap48Key: Um... I'm generally good with the cold, but... if I freeze, I'll die, so... somewhere warm would be nice...
keys.DonQuixoteRegularTap49Key:
Here you go—Demonkey fur! Huh? It smells?
But the smell is kind of addicting once you get used to it... and it's actually quite valuable in my village...

keys.DraftPVPExplanationKey:
Welcome to Draft PVP

You will draft a team of 8 characters and 8 weapons and then challenge other players to gain points.

1 Win is 1 point
1 loss will lower your current points depending on your max points
0-2: -0
3-5: -1
6-8: -2
9-11: -3
You can never go below 0 points. 
When you end a run you will get a reward based on the maximum point total earned that run. 12 Points will get you the best reward.
You can play up to 30 matches each run.

All players will receive the the same number of weapons and characters of each rarity. 

All weapons and characters will be level 60, fully awakened and ultra evolved.
keys.DraftPVPSorryNewsLongKey:
We have identified and resolved an issue that caused certain purchases in the current Draft PvP shop to not be received correctly.

As an apology for this issue, 800 Draft Coins and 300 Soul Stones have been sent to all accounts that existed at the time this was resolved.

Thank you for playing Evertale.
keys.DraftPVPSorryNewsShortKey: Rewards have been sent as compensation. Please expand this news for more information.
keys.DragonGirlRegularGacha45Key:
Who dares disturb my slumber?
You have some nerve, human child.

Well, I suppose sleeping all the time
gets tedious after a while.
Entertain me. Or else... Hehe.
keys.DragonGirlRegularIdle50Key: Youth these days... How dare you neglect me like this!
keys.DragonGirlRegularLogin46Key: Hmph, you again. You are in luck, I'm in a generous mood today. Let's go.
keys.DragonGirlRegularTap47Key: We, Dragon Lords, were born to defeat the Aeon Emperor. That purpose we pass down along with our souls. I still have it in my current vessel, as well as the sorrowful memories of all the times I tried and failed to accomplish it...
keys.DragonGirlRegularTap48Key:
Is that thing you're holding a chestnut bun!?
Hm, I feel like I haven't been given nearly enough offerings lately. Are you going to do something about it?
keys.DragonGirlRegularTap49Key:
You want to go to that far-off town? Honestly...
Well, stop staring and get on my back.
...Ack, I forgot that won't work in this form...
keys.EarthGoddessGacha45Key:
It's nice to meet you!
I am called Gaia.
I shall enjoy accompanying you.

I fear and hate the use of power,
but if you bear a just heart,
I will lend you what strength I have.
keys.EarthGoddessIdle50Key:
Tranquility is the essence of beauty.
Hehe, do you feel the same way?
keys.EarthGoddessLogin46Key:
I have awaited you.
Now, let's go on to defend this beloved world.
keys.EarthGoddessTap47Key:
I do not like power.
Power that grows too much always leads to sadness.
keys.EarthGoddessTap48Key:
Everyone is born from here, and everyone returns here one day.
I cherish that fate.
keys.EarthGoddessTap49Key:
I have grown too distrustful.
But I am deeply grateful for the generosity you have shown.
keys.EarthMercenaryGacha39Key:
I'm Tobias, Fist of the Earth!
Come on, I'll let you be a part of my legend!
keys.ElfBattleMageGacha21Key:
I'm Ludorié, a chief of Dandelio.
A team of humans?
Hmph. Well, I guess we'll see how far you can go.
keys.ElfFireSamuraiGacha45Key:
I'm Akatsuki, swordmaster!
It's you, right? The one who's
getting into all these wild fights?
You're a brave one! Let me join in!
Huh? I mean, I wouldn't mind
taking you on myself!
keys.ElfFireSamuraiIdle50Key:
I'm so bored!
Maybe I'll try to pick a fight with some random punk.
keys.ElfFireSamuraiLogin46Key:
Oh, there you are!
Alright then, let's head out for a fight in good spirits!
keys.ElfFireSamuraiTap47Key:
Whoa there!
Watch your hands. You might get burned!
Heh, just kidding.
keys.ElfFireSamuraiTap48Key:
What, training?
I prefer real fights, myself.
keys.ElfFireSamuraiTap49Key:
You know, now that I'm looking closer, you look like a real fighter.
Want to get a round in before we eat?
keys.ElfMusicianGacha41Key:
I am Velle, wandering bard.
I would gladly join you and craft
the ballad of your journey.

And of course, I will help, too!
It will be my pleasure!
keys.ElizabethRegularGacha45Key:
I am Queen Elizabeth of the Kingdom of Greyford.
I have come to fulfill the mission of protecting 
my kingdom—a land rich in tradition and prestige.

If you prove to be of no value to our kingdom,
I will immediately dissolve this alliance.
I will not take any objections!
keys.ElizabethRegularIdle50Key:
Mother, do you think I am fulfilling my duties as queen...?
Please keep watch over me.
keys.ElizabethRegularLogin46Key:
You're here—very well, let us proceed.
Naturally, I, Elizabeth, shall take the lead!
keys.ElizabethRegularTap47Key:
Eek! A bug...on my shoulder...S-Someone get it off me...!
Oh? It flew away? Ahem...Kindly pretend that you didn't hear anything.
keys.ElizabethRegularTap48Key:
Oh, where is this sweet, vanilla scent coming from?
Maybe Ellis is preparing the afternoon tea♪
keys.ElizabethRegularTap49Key:
My most treasured possession is the pair of earrings my mother gave me!
They're incredibly important to me. Of course I'd never lose them!
keys.ElminaBunnyGacha45Key:
Say, do you have any idea how I wound up as a bunny girl?
You think it suits me? B-because I'm so beautiful!?
Oh, you...
Well, it doesn't happen every day, so I g-guess I'll make the most of it!
keys.ElminaBunnyIdle50Key:
I wonder how the children of Nushelle are doing.
I'll have to play with them one of these days.
keys.ElminaBunnyLogin46Key: Yoohoo! C'mon, spend some quality time with your big sister!
keys.ElminaBunnyTap47Key: Maybe this getup isn't really suitable for children...
keys.ElminaBunnyTap48Key:
Hmm? Were you looking at me?
C'mon, out with it—don't be shy!
keys.ElminaBunnyTap49Key:
Didn't Rizette wear something like this, too?
She did, didn't she?
keys.ElminaIdle48Key:
I can keep such a cheerful disposition thanks to my friends, and thanks to you.
Oh, were you awake?
Just...Keep all that to yourself!
keys.ElminaLogin44Key:
Hi there, good to see you.
Okay then, come along, let's get to work!
keys.ElminaModernGacha45Key:

keys.FellowshipHelpKey:
Enhance your entire Battalion by creating bonds between your characters! A Fellowship can be unlocked permanently if you own fully awakened copies of all characters that make up the Fellowship. 

Unlocking a Fellowship will provide a specified Stat Bonus to all of your units while they fight as Platoons in your Battalion. 

Each Fellowship unlocked will also grant a one-time bonus reward, and permanently increase the total Power of your Platoons.


--- Fellowship Stat Bonuses ---


You can view your currently unlocked totals on the left of the Fellowship screen, and these totals will apply to all of your units in Platoon combat as follows: 

- Flat HP -
Increases the max HP of your units by the amount you have unlocked. 

- Flat ATK -
Increases the Attack of your units by the amount you have unlocked. 

- % HP -
Increases the max HP of your units by the % you have unlocked. 

- % ATK -
Adds your unlocked % amount as a bonus to attacks.

keys.ForgeHelpDisclaimerKey: Forging anything that can Awaken creates its own Awakening Shard.
keys.ForgeHelpKey:
Forge Characters and Weapons to create items!

Everything Forged is exchanged for the items created.


--- Ways to Forge ---


<color=#00edf6>Manual Forge</color>

To manually Forge Characters or Weapons, please select those that you wish to Forge then press the Forge button. You cannot select anything that is locked, in a Platoon, or set as your Mercenary.


<color=#00edf6>Auto-Forge</color>

The Auto-Forge button will automatically Forge duplicate copies of Characters or Weapons that are not locked, have no training other than Boosts, and are not set in a Team, Platoon, or set as your Mercenary. You can check the "Auto-Forge SSR" box if you wish for SSR Characters or Weapons to be included.


<color=#00edf6>Auto-Forge after Summon</color>

After performing a Soul Summon or Friend Summon, you may Auto Forge any newly received SR and below duplicates by checking the box before leaving the Summon Result screen. This setting will remain on for future summons until you uncheck the box.


<color=#00edf6>Forge when Awakening</color>

If you use duplicates of a Character or Weapon as Awakening materials, the Character(s) or Weapon(s) will be Forged. Excess Awakenings will be converted into Awakening Shards, but otherwise no Awakening Shards will be received when Forging in this way, as they are used to awaken the Character or Weapon.


--- Forge Results ---


<color=#00edf6>Guaranteed Items from Summoned Characters and Weapons</color>

- Gold -
Both Characters and Weapons produce Gold when Forged.

- Exp Coin (Character) -
Forged Characters will produce an amount of these.

- Exp Coin (Weapon) -
Forged Weapons will produce an amount of these.


<color=#00edf6>Additional Items</color>

- Awakening Shards -
If it can Awaken, a Character or Weapon will produce its own Awakening Shard(s) when Forged, equal to 1 + the number of Awakenings it has.

- Boost Gem (Character) -
Any Boosts on Forged Characters will be converted into the amount of Boost Gems they cost.

- Boost Gem (Weapon) -
Any Boosts on Forged Weapons will be converted into the amount of Boost Gems they cost.


<color=#00edf6>Rare Items</color>

- Limit Break Potion (Character) -
Chance to be produced when Forging Characters. Chance and amount that can be produced is determined by the rarity of the Forged Characters.

- Limit Break Potion (Weapon) -
Chance to be produced when Forging Weapons. Chance and amount that can be produced is determined by the rarity of the Forged Weapons.

- Exploration Decree -
Chance to be produced when Forging Characters and Weapons. Chance and amount that can be produced is determined by the rarity of the Forged Characters and Weapons.


Please note that Characters and Weapons obtained in the Offline Story may only produce Silver when Forged, with few exceptions.

keys.GuildWarHelpKey:
Top Alliances fight for glory across Erden in massive Alliance Wars! 


--- Alliance War Format --- 


- Alliance Wars are held across 5 different maps. Each map will be contested in an Alliance War for a number of days before moving onto the next map. There may be break days where no Alliance War occurs between maps. 
- The current map in rotation is the same across all servers. If a server opens in the middle of a map's duration, it will have the same number of days remaining as on pre-existing servers. 
- A map's final scoreboard is retained until another Alliance War begins in it. 


--- Alliance War Phases --- 


Alliance Wars can be broken down into 5 phases each day. 


<color=#00edf6>Pre-Declaration Phase: Begins 00:00 (Server Time)</color>

As a new day begins, the top 16 Alliances in the Fame Ranking on your server are granted Declarations; 2 for the top 8, and 1 for the rest. Declarations will become usable in the next phase.

If a new map is beginning, 2 Level 1 Castle's are granted to Alliances in Fame Rank order, until no Level 1 Castles remain unheld on the new map. 

Once these things are determined, all Alliance Fame is reset for the new day. 


<color=#00edf6>Declaration Phase: 
UTC-0500 Servers: 11:00 - 20:00 (Server Time)
UTC+0200 Servers: 09:00 - 20:00 (Server Time)
UTC+0900 Servers: 08:00 - 20:00 (Server Time)</color> 

If an Alliance had enough fame the previous day to declare any attack on a Castle, any Alliance member can issue these declaration(s) during this phase. Declaring on a Castle allows your Alliance to attack that castle in the upcoming Battle Phase.

You may only declare on Castles that are Adjacent to one that your Alliance already holds. If your Alliance does not hold any Castles but qualifies for a Declaration, you may declare on any Level 1 Castle. 

Your alliance must hold at least 1 Level 1 Castle to declare on a Level 2 Castle, and at least 1 Level 2 Castle (or 2 Level 1 Castles) to declare on a Level 3 Castle. 

Once a Declaration is issued, it cannot be retracted. 
Once a Declaration is issued on a Castle, no other Alliance can Declare on that Castle until the next Declaration Phase. 

Battalion Data is also saved for the day in the 15 minutes before this phase begins, before updating one more time just before the Pre-Battle Phase. 


<color=#00edf6>Pre-Battle Phase: 20:00 - 21:00 (Server Time)</color> 

In the 15 minutes before this phase begins, all Battalion data is updated and locked in. Platoons will appear and fight in the upcoming Battle Phase as they were when their data was updated, so any platoon edits during the 15 minutes before the pre-battle phase may or may not be reflected during the Battle Phase as the exact timing can vary. 


<color=#00edf6>Battle Phase: 21:00 - 21:45 (Server Time)</color> 

During the Battle Phase, Platoons can be sent to attack Castles which your Alliance has currently declared on. If a Castle is attacked while it has no defending Platoons, it will change hands to be held by the Alliance attacking it, and enters a 15 minute protection period. 

Following the protection period, the Alliance that previously held the Castle may attack it until the end of the Battle Phase. If the original holders can take the Castle back, it cannot be attacked again that day. 


<color=#00edf6>Post Battle Phase: 21:45 - 00:00 (Server Time)</color> 

When the Battle Phase ends, scores are calculated and rewards for the day are distributed. End of map rewards will also be distributed here if it was the final day of a map. 


--- Platoon Placement --- 


- Starting in the declaration phase, and until the end of the Battle Phase, Platoons may be placed to defend a Castle your alliance holds. Platoons can also be placed to attack a Castle that your Alliance has declared upon, but only during the Battle Phase. 
- Platoons each have 2 points of Energy for use in Alliance War which resets back to 2 each day. If a Platoon has no Energy left, it cannot be deployed to attack or defend a Castle. 
- If a Platoon is attacking or defending a Castle, it cannot be deployed elsewhere during the current day until it is either defeated or successfully takes a Castle when attacking. 
- If a Platoon is defeated or successfully takes a castle, it will lose 1 point of Energy, and may then be redeployed to attack or defend a Castle if it has any Energy remaining. 
- Platoons will fight in order of which they are placed in a Castle, but you may reorder your Alliance's defending Platoon list if you are a Captain, Strategist, General or Master in your Alliance. The first 3 Platoons in the list cannot move once the battle phase begins. 


--- Rules for Battles in Alliance War ---


- Battles in Alliance War happen automatically and are resolved in a matter of seconds. 
- Alliance War battles use Platoons so no Leader Skills are active, but Fellowship bonuses will apply. 
- The first attacking Platoon deployed to a Castle will fight the first defending Platoon assigned to that Castle. 
- A winning Platoon is fully healed and slightly weakened before continuing to fight the next enemy Platoon assigned to the Castle. 
- When there are no defending Platoons left in a Castle, an attacking Platoon will instead capture the Castle for its Alliance. 
- In Alliance War, the attacking Platoon will always have a starting TU advantage against the defender. 


--- Other Notes --- 


<color=#00edf6>Scoring</color>

- At the end of a Battle Phase, each Alliance gains points equal to the total Dominion Points of Castles that they own. 
- At the end of each map, the Alliance with the most points is victorious! 


<color=#00edf6>Rewards</color>

- Each Castle held at the end of a Battle Phase will grant a Dominion Reward to each Alliance member that deployed any Platoons to Attack or Defend any Castle in the map on that day. 
- After the last Battle Phase of a map, each Alliance member will receive Map Completion Rewards depending on their Alliance's final Score Ranking on the map. 


<color=#00edf6>Tiebreakers</color>

- In individual battles, draws can occur if all units are defeated at the same time, or a battle resolves in a stalemate after too many turns elapse. A draw will always be considered a victory for the defending Platoon. 
- In Alliance War Score Rankings, scores may occasionally be tied. Ranking order between tied scores is then determined by the previous day's Alliance Fame Rankings, and is finalized at the end of the final Battle Phase of a map. 


<color=#00edf6>Battle Replays</color>

- Replays of key battles that occurred in a Castle can be viewed when inspecting it.
- Replays will generally be kept until the end of the Post Battle Phase, but may be cleared whenever battle data is updated. 


<color=#00edf6>Changing Allegiance</color>

If you leave an Alliance, you cannot participate in an Alliance War until the next day.

Uh...um...

So stylish... Hmm...

keys.JeanneDarkSwimsuitIdle53Key:

keys.JeanneDarkSwimsuitLogin49Key:

keys.JeanneDarkSwimsuitTap50Key:

keys.JeanneDarkSwimsuitTap51Key:

Not telling you∼
keys.JeanneDarkSwimsuitTap52Key:

God has abandoned me long ago...
keys.JeanneDarkTap47Key:
A sense of time?

Undying creatures have no need of such.
keys.JeanneDarkTap48Key:

I suppose that this undying body has no need of such.
Ah, but... Before I became so...
I have a memory of great heat, and someone laughing.
Someone was crying, too. I remember that.
keys.JeanneDarkTap49Key:
What happened?

keys.JeanneGacha45Key:

keys.JeanneIdle50Key:

keys.JeanneLogin46Key: Let us go together today, as the light guides us!

keys.LimitBreakExplanationTextKey:
Raise the Mastery Level of your units to customize their elemental strengths!

Each Mastery Level (up to the max of 40) awards your unit Mastery Points that you can allocate toward Banes or Shields against elements of your choice, up to a 20% increase of a single attribute.

Unlike damage reduction skills, these increases directly modify a units latent elemental strengths and weaknesses. For example, a Fire unit begins with a 25% increase to damage against Earth units, and a 20% defense against damage from Earth units. So with 15% Earth Bane, the Fire unit will have a total bonus to damage of 40% against Earth units! An Earth unit could reduce this total bonus by the value of their Fire Shield from their own Mastery.

The higher you raise an attribute, the more points it will cost to increase further.

You must press Confirm to complete point allocation before your choices will take effect. Choose wisely, as the only way to reset spent points once you confirm allocation is by consuming a Reset Core.
keys.LimitBreakNewsExplanationTextKey:
New Mastery System now available in the Units menu!

You can now raise the Mastery Level of your units to customize their elemental strengths!

Each Mastery Level (up to the max of 20) awards your unit Mastery Points that you can allocate toward Attack or Defense against elements of your choice, up to a 15% increase of a single attribute.

Unlike damage reduction skills, these increases directly modify a units latent elemental strengths and weaknesses. For example, a Fire unit begins with a 25% increase to damage against Earth units, and a 20% defense against damage from Earth units. So with 15% Earth Attack Up, the Fire unit will have a total bonus to damage of 40% against Earth units! An Earth unit could reduce this total bonus by the value of their Fire Defense Up from their own Mastery.

The higher you raise an attribute, the more points it will cost to increase further.

You must press Confirm to complete point allocation before your choices will take effect. Choose wisely, as the only way to reset spent points once you confirm allocation is by consuming a Reset Medal.

 "I can't"s!

keys.MassiveCombatHelpKey:
--- Battalion Warfare Modes ---


<color=#00edf6>Tower of Trials</color>

Challenge powerful bosses, collect Loot gathered by your Battalion over time, and Explore for rare items!


<color=#00edf6>Arena</color>

Battalions fight it out for Glory in the Arena! Arena rewards include Arena Coins, which can be exchanged for items in the Arena Shop.


<color=#00edf6>Alliance Quest</color>

Complete Quests to earn experience for your Alliance and Alliance Coins, which can be exchanged for items in the Alliance Shop.


<color=#00edf6>Raid</color>

Form parties with up to 2 other players to take down powerful Raid Bosses!


<color=#00edf6>Alliance War</color>

Top Alliances fight for glory across Erden in massive Alliance Wars!


<color=#00edf6>Champion's Arena (Cross-World Event)</color> 

Battle against top players in a Cross-World competition.


<color=#00edf6>War of the Realms (Cross-World Event)</color> 

Top Alliances fight to be the best of the best in a Cross-World competition.


Cross-World events will be made available when a suitable group of servers to match your server with is available.

Evertale update 2.0 will launch in January 2021. In this update, Evertale will be split into different servers. A globe button has been added to the main menu where you can pre-select your server to ensure a smooth transition from 1.0 to 2.0.
1 week prior to the launch, we will release an in-game news update with the exact date on which the update will happen.

Thank you for playing Evertale!

keys.PVPAIMatchUpdateKey:
PVP Matches

In order to lower wait times and improve the quality of matches we have added a new system to PVP. In this new system matchmaking will first look for a player in the queue with a rating that is close to yours, if one cannot be found within a reasonable amount of time then you will be matched against a team that was used recently by a player with a rating that is close to yours. This team will be controlled by AI. The majority of matches will still be against real players playing in real time. If your rating is above 1500 you will not be assigned a match against an AI opponent.

How will this affect Ranked PVP?

During a ranked PVP season, it will be possible to be matched against an AI until you reach tier ten or better.

keys.RaidHelpKey:
Form parties with up to 2 other players to take down powerful Raid Bosses!

Raid sessions occur at set times twice daily, and you may win up to 3 Raids per session. The rewards earned from a Raid are determined by the Raid difficulty, and if it is the first time you defeat a certain Raid Boss within the session.

During a Raid session, you may select the Raid Boss that you wish to challenge in order to either create or join a Raid Party.

Each player within a Raid Party contributes their first Platoon to the Raid effort, with the Raid Party Leader's Platoon taking the first position in the lineup. Raid battles play out automatically within seconds, and can be viewed or skipped as you wish.

When creating a Raid Party, you may set the minimum Platoon Power that can join, and you may choose to make it open only to members of your Alliance. Regardless of those choices, you may also send a shortcut to join your Raid Party to Alliance Chat.

Once a Raid Party is created, the Raid Party Leader may begin the Raid so long as any other players in the Raid Party have pressed that they are Ready. The Raid Party Leader may remove other players from the Raid Party.

keys.RankingHelpKey:
Compete to be the best on your server! You can view the profiles of other Players and Alliances shown on these rankings by tapping on them. 


<color=#00edf6>Battalion Power</color> 

Players on your server are ranked here by their total Battalion Power. 


<color=#00edf6>Tower of Trials</color> 

Players on your server are ranked here by progress in the Tower of Trials. 


<color=#00edf6>Player Rank</color> 

Players on your server are ranked here by their Player Rank. 


<color=#00edf6>Alliance Level</color> 

Alliances on your server are ranked here by their Alliance Exp. 


<color=#00edf6>Alliance Fame</color> 

Alliances on your server are ranked here by their Fame. This ranking determines an Alliance's eligibility to participate in the next day's Alliance Wars. Fame resets to 0 daily. 


--- Ranking Ties ---  


Ties are resolved on a first to the score basis. In other words, a ranking position will not be overtaken unless its ranking criteria is exceeded by another player or Alliance. The exception is Player Rank, where Player Rank Exp is the tiebreaker.

keys.ServerIssuesLongKey:
Thank you for playing Evertale.

There has been some connectivity issues with our servers recently, but these issues are now fixed. We are sorry for the inconvenience, and as compensation, we have handed out 1000 Soul Stones to all players whose accounts existed before this announcement. If you are eligible, then these Soul Stones should now be added directly to your account, so they do not need to be claimed from your reward box.

If you are still having issues with connecting to our servers, please contact our customer support at evertalesupport@zigzagame.com
Thank you for your understanding and support!
keys.ServerIssuesShortKey: There have been some connectivity issues with our servers This problem is now fixed.
keys.ServerSelectBasicInfoKey:
In an upcoming update, Evertale will split into servers! Below is a list of servers that we will have when the new system begins. Please choose where you want to go! Players in the same server will compete in various events like Guild War together.

Special Notes:
- All guilds will belong to the server that the guild leader has chosen.

- All members who are not on the same server their guild is on will be removed from the guild upon update day.

- All friends that are not in the same server as you on migration day will no longer be your friend.

- Until the migration day, you can revisit your decision by tapping on the globe icon on the main menu. However, after migration, your account will be locked to the server of your choice.

- Unless you are coordinating with your friends or guild members, it is better to avoid crowded servers, because it means the competition within Server contests are expected to be tougher, and therefore harder to earn good rewards.
