keys.SupportGiantWallOfTextKey:
○ Attention:
・Please be sure to check the FAQ at the bottom of this page before sending in a question.
・Be sure to configure your email client to allow emails from the [@zigzagame.com] domain.
・Only Japanese and/or English-language inquiries are supported.
・Depending on the contents of your message, a reply may be delayed, or you may not receive a reply.


<About The Game>

Q. Do I have to pay every time I install the game?
A. After purchasing the game once, the application can be reinstalled as many times as you want for free.

Q. Are there any differences between iOS and Android versions?
A. There are no differences between the game versions.
Users on different platforms can also be matched for PvP and other functions.

Q. My character and weapon stash sizes suddenly went up. What happened?
A. Character and weapon stash size will increase when your Hero Rank increases, when you purchase Soul Stones, and when certain other conditions are met.
You can also use Soul Stones to increase your stash size.


<About Game Data>

Q. How do I transfer my account data to another device?
A. Transferring account data is done with a unique restore code that is assigned to you.
Take the restore code from the device you are switching from, and input it into the device you are switching to.
This process is automated if we detect a restore code backed up for you.

Q. Can I play on multiple devices at the same time?
A. No, you cannot.
When account data is transferred, the original device will no longer be able to access the account linked to the restore code.

Q. I don't have my restore code. Can I still restore my lost game data?
A. If you have lost your restore code and we do not detect a backed up, please contact us. You will be asked to confirm several pieces of information regarding your account. (For this reason, we require that only the actual player of the account contact us.)
If insufficient information is given to confirm your identity, we reserve the right to refuse to send the restore code. Thank you for your understanding.

Q. Is there a limit on how many times I can use my restore code?
A. There is no limit on the number of times a restore code can be used.
Each accountis assigned a restore code upon creation, which cannot be changed.
Be sure to keep your restore code secure and do not share it with anyone.

Q. If I change my Google account or AppleID info, can I still use the same restore code?
A. You will still be able to use the same restore code.

Q. I want to start over from the beginning. Can I?
A. Yes. From the title screen, please select a server you have not yet played on to create a new save file on that server.
Your account can have separate save data for each server you have played on.


<About Servers>

Q. What time zone are timed events scheduled by for each server region?
A. Events will be scheduled based on either CST, GMT, or JST - whichever time zone is local to the server's region.

Q. Can I move my save data to another server?
A. Game save data cannot be moved from one server to another.


<About Soul Stones>

Q. Can I get refunds on Soul Stone purchases?
A. Unfortunately, we cannot offer exchanges, returns, or refunds for purchases of digital goods.

Q. What's the difference between paid Soul Stones and unpaid Soul Stones?
A. Paid Soul Stones are Soul Stones obtained from in-app purchases, while unpaid Soul Stones are received as in-game rewards, etc., for no cost.
Please note that when using Soul Stones, paid Soul Stones will be consumed before unpaid Soul Stones.

Q. Can I transfer Soul Stones or VIP level from one save file on my account to another?
A. Both Soul Stones and VIP level are bound to the save file and Server on which they are earned or purchased and cannot be transferred.


<About Battles>

Q. What happens if I Quicken an ally with an active TU Cost Down weapon skill?
A. Multiple effects that reduce the TU cost of active skills can stack on the same unit if the skills allow, but will have diminishing returns.

Q. How is damage calculated when there are multiple effects decreasing damage?
A. Damage reduction skill effects can stack on the same unit, incoming damage is reduced by each applicable effect in turn until all have applied. (E.g. 50% reduction of 1400 damage is 700, if reduced by 50% by another skill is a result of 350 damage.)
The elemental strength difference between attacking and targeted units applies after all of the above is calculated, and cannot be nullified by attacks which ignore damage reduction effects.


<Other>

Q. I sent in a question, but it's been several days and there's been no reply.
A. Messages received outside of business hours, or inquiries requiring investigation, may take some time for a reply.
Additionally, you may not receive a reply if:

・Your question is answered in the Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ) page.
・Your question is answered in the in-game tutorial or Help pages.
・For any reason, your question is a difficult one to answer.

In addition, please check your spam folder and email client settings. Make sure that emails from domain [@zigzagame.com] are allowed in your settings.

keys.TrainingHelpKey:
Spend Gold and other resources to Power Up your Characters and Weapons! 

Some Power Up options may be locked until you reach a certain Player Rank.

Some Power Up options increase the effectiveness of other Power Ups. This effect applies retroactively, so the order in which they are gained does not matter.


--- Instant Power Up Buttons ---


These will spend their respective resources to Power Up a unit immediately on press, and can be held to Power Up repeatedly while sufficient resources are available. 


<color=#00edf6>Level Up</color> 

Spends Gold and Exp Coins in order to increase the selected unit's level, up to its current Level Cap. Note that leveling a unit up to Level 40 will only cost Gold upon reaching a certain Player Rank.


<color=#00edf6>Boost</color> 

Spends Gold and Boost Gems in order to increase the selected unit's Boost amount, up to your current Player Rank (max 300). Each boost adds a flat amount to the Attack and HP of a unit. 


<color=#00edf6>Potential</color> 

Spends Gold and Fruit of Potential (for Characters) or Ore of Potential (for Weapons) to increase the selected unit's Potential. A unit's Potential percent will increase its stats gained from Level, Awakening, and Limit Break bonuses.


--- Limit Break --- 


Once a unit is at maximum level, it may be able to Limit Break. Limit Breaks cost Gold and Limit break potions, and will increase the maximum level, Attack and HP of a unit.

Units may be Limit Broken multiple times, up to a limit.

If a unit has any greyed out stars, the next limit break will fill one of these stars, and may unlock new Skills for Characters, or enhance the Weapon Skill of a Weapon.

When a greyed out star is filled by a Limit Break in this way, the Cost of a unit may also increase, and Characters may change to a new form.

Some Characters obtained in the Offline Story may change into a new form automatically upon reaching a certain level.


--- Awakening --- 


Characters and Weapons can be Awakened by fusing additional copies of the same unit, or Awakening Shards of the same unit. Units will get an Awakening Bonus to their Attack and HP with each Awakening, and Characters can also unlock additional Passive Skills.

Once an SSR Character is fully Awakened and reaches Level 100, it can Ascend to a new form at no extra cost. Ascension grants an additional Attack and HP boost once achieved.


--- Mastery --- 


Mastery allows you to increase and customize a Character's Elemental strengths. Mastery level costs Gold and Mastery Scrolls to increase. Please see help in the Mastery screen for more details.

Accumulate special VIP rewards and benefits as you make purchases in Evertale!

VIP points are gained when making in app purchases, and accumulate towards your VIP level on your server.

Each level of VIP grants one time rewards that can be claimed on the VIP screen, as well as access to a one time special deal for valuable resources. The rewards from the Daily VIP chest will also increase with your VIP level.

There are many other perks to being a VIP in Evertale, which are detailed in full for each level on the VIP screen.


--- <color=#00edf6>Exclusive VIP Rewards</color> ---

The following are exclusively available as one time rewards from reaching certain VIP levels:

- 1x Szi Flame (R Accessory)
- 5x Hymelian Thunder (SR Weapon)
- 1x Tropical Timekeeper (SR Accessory)

We are aware that an issue occurred during the opening of the current Alliance War on certain UTC+0900 region servers that affected the proper distribution of starting castles and declarations to qualifying Alliances.

While we would ideally want to restart the Alliance War to remedy this, due to the nature of the issue that occurred this is not a feasible solution. We apologize for any inconvenience caused by these issues and will be monitoring the situation.

keys.WhiteSnakeGirlGacha45Key:
I am Mizuchi Akame, one of the onmyoji elites.
I am an ally of the forgotten,
and defender of the mortal.

Because one day they will be found.
Until then, I will keep on fighting alone,
no matter if others approve or not.

Oh, but thank you for
subscribing to my channel!
Don't forget to hit that like button!
keys.WhiteSnakeGirlIdle50Key:
This room is so cold...

Huh, I fell asleep.
Cold is my one weakness!
keys.WhiteSnakeGirlLogin46Key:
Morning! It's Mizuchi, famous Orotuber! Huh?
What is happening? Is the yin and yang imbalance interfering with my connection!?
keys.WhiteSnakeGirlTap47Key:
Yes, I am the strongest member of the onmyoji.
What's that? Some other girls said I wasn't?
I see, I see...
Heehee, it looks like they need a little reminder.
keys.WhiteSnakeGirlTap48Key:
Hey, hasn't that boring guy been talking whatever he wants for a while now?
I don't remember inviting him as a guest!
And who is that goofy sounding person I can hear right now? I don't remember summoning a shikigami like this, either...
keys.WhiteSnakeGirlTap49Key:
Stillness and motion. That is also the harmony between yin and yang.
When you are tired, get some rest.
No, no! You can't go to sleep now!
I'm getting ready to stream!
keys.WouldYouLikeToKeepPlayingKey: Would you like to continue playing or go to the main menu?
keys.YamatoRegularGacha45Key:
A pleasure to make your acquaintance!
I'm Yamato, Student Council President of Shinano Academy!

As a Vessel, and above all, as a representative

Please, lend me your strength!
keys.YamatoRegularIdle50Key:

This is all part of the President's job!
keys.YamatoRegularLogin46Key:
Ah, I was just about to head out.
Are you ready? Then let's weigh anchor!

I asked Rio to handle my weapon's maintenance, but...

keys.YamatoRegularTap48Key:
You're interested in the military stuff too!? Let's have a chat!!

keys.YamatoRegularTap49Key:
I often get asked for relationship advice...As the Student Council President, I'd like to answer, but...
I don't have experience myself, so I can't answer...
keys.YandereMaidDarkGacha45Key:
I'm Clarice, the black maid.

keys.YandereMaidDarkIdle50Key:

keys.YandereMaidDarkLogin46Key:
You're 30 seconds late. Are you telling me you can't listen to my orders?

keys.YandereMaidDarkTap48Key:
A little warning for you: beware of the wicked mage.

keys.YandereMaidDarkTap49Key:

keys.YandereMaidGacha45Key:
I am Clarice, a humble maid.
Are you my new master?
Cooking, cleaning laundry....

Infiltration, tracking, assassination...
Whatever your orders, I'm happy to obey.
As long as you are a fit master.
One never knows when this blade with change directions.
It's an unpredictable thing.
Kuhuhu, what are your orders?
keys.YandereMaidIdle50Key:
What are you you doing resting?

keys.YandereMaidLogin46Key:
Oh, have you been here all along?

keys.YandereMaidRaceQueenIdle50Key:
Everyone's gone somewhere else...

keys.YandereMaidRaceQueenLogin46Key:
Miss Lud—Ah. It's just you.
Well, hurry up and get in the car!

keys.YandereMaidRaceQueenTap48Key: I will always and forever be Miss Ludmilla's maid. I might be a race queen right now, but that is one role I'm never going to retire from!
keys.YandereMaidRaceQueenTap49Key:
Kuhuhu, matching outfits with my mistress...♪

keys.YandereMaidSwimsuitGacha45Key:
I am Clarice, a servant of, for,
and exclusive to my mistress.

Does it suit me?

calling on me all of a sudden.
Kuhuhu... Are you ready for your penance?
keys.YandereMaidSwimsuitIdle50Key:
You know I am here, and yet still your guard is down.
Not even a thought of being poisoned.
I will admit it. Your attitude has a certain resemblance to my mistress. Resemblance only. Nothing more than that.
keys.YandereMaidSwimsuitLogin46Key:
Mistress? Mistress!
What? I called you by her name?
O-Oh, oooh nooo...
What a terrible mistake...
Vile, terrible, horrible, unforgivable...
keys.YandereMaidSwimsuitTap47Key:
...
Do you not see I am ignoring you?
I would appreciate you never speaking to me again.
keys.YandereMaidSwimsuitTap48Key:
...
I told you not to talk, didn't I?
I accept such open frankness aimed directly at me from one person and one person only...
keys.YandereMaidSwimsuitTap49Key:
Oh, mistress! You look wonderful in a swimsuit, as well!
Me, too?
Kuhuhu, thank you.
This person here said the same...
Ah, no. Never mind.
keys.YandereMaidTap47Key:
Such familiarity with my mistress...!
Die, die, die a thousand deaths!

Kuhuhu, no sleep for you tonight!
keys.YandereMaidTap48Key:
What I like?
Number one is my mistress, and number two is my mistress...
Numbers three, four, five...
Care to guess who is six and seven? What else?
Well... I don't hate plants, or tea.
Or fairy tales either...
keys.YandereMaidTap49Key:
Were you that little country girl's brother?
Where did you learn to cook like that?
That's—Huh!? I see.
I think you should do this instead.

keys.ZeusRegularGacha45Key:
Who is it that awakens me?
O one who knows no fear…
Very well, I shall answer your call.

I am Zeus, with absolute power and authority!
The one who governs all heaven and earth!
keys.ZeusRegularIdle50Key:
Hmm... what an utterly meaningless stretch of time...
Perhaps I should order the Valkyries to do some combat training... Or maybe I'll have Rizette make some tea instead...
keys.ZeusRegularLogin46Key:
You must have quite the death wish to keep me waiting...
I shall grant you one chance to redeem yourself. Now go!
keys.ZeusRegularTap47Key:
The most repulsive thing in this world is a heart of betrayal...
Even I possess a heart that despises such things...
keys.ZeusRegularTap48Key:
Love is such a fragile thing... Can a creature like you grasp this?
Hmph... That was a pointless question.
keys.ZeusRegularTap49Key:
You wish to see me smile? You ask the strangest of things...
But if that is what you wish, it's simple. Kneel right there and lick my boots!
keys.ZoroRegularGacha45Key:
Mucho gusto—pleased to meet you.
The Marvelous Zoro has arrived!

Oh my, you seem bored as well.

I'm sure a delightful adventure awaits us!
keys.ZoroRegularIdle50Key:
No one's around.

keys.ZoroRegularLogin46Key:

keys.ZoroRegularTap47Key: I like pretty and beautiful things. The person I love most is my adorable younger sister. What I hate might be bugs crawling on the ground.
keys.ZoroRegularTap48Key:
The crispy and creamy crema catalana is usually a dessert for special days.
But my sister said it was delicious, so in our home we have it every day!
keys.ZoroRegularTap49Key:
I'm not very close with my father... It's not that I dislike him.
